reviews.title: Very bad service
reviews.text: This hotel post Wrong information in the web,the service of reception is bad,the room is not clean enough,the cups is dirty,some of the equipment are broken,the foods of breakfast is not fresh that like have been place on the table several days.In a word,I don't like this hotel very much, I won't choose this hotel any more! I doubt that how do you get the 5 stars??!!
reviews.response:
"Dear Lai, thank you for sharing about your stay at Sheraton Fuzhou Hotel and spending your precious time to complete the review for us.
We regret that you did not have a pleasant stay with us regarding to breakfast. Please be assured that your invaluable feedback will be shared with our team and related departments as we strive to provide exceptional service to every guest that stays with us.
Once again, thank you for selecting Sheraton Fuzhou Hotel and we look forward to welcoming you back in the near future for a wonderful stay with us.
Warm regards."

reviews.title: relaxing, peaceful enviroment
reviews.text:
I was  extremely pleased with the air port pick up.
Extremely disappointed with restaurant .

When I  was checking out I was given an account which I had already paid for when I pointed out the situation the receptionist did not come back did not care that I had a connecting flight after some time I then departed embarassing.
reviews.positives: Beautiful views of the surrounding mountains, comfortable bed clean linen, decor

reviews.title: Needs time to develop ambiance
reviews.text: This new hotel although brand spanking and spectacular with cathedral like spaces, copious marble and impressive artwork, was set in a location devoid of character or charm.  On a newly reclaimed chunk of land that was part of the river there was nothing in the vicinity of any interest.  I only stayed one night as it was close to the South Railway station.  I was supported by my work but I am a man of modest means personally and couldn't afford to eat at the incredibly expensive cafes and restaurants.  I went looking for a 'hole in the wall' Chinese eatery nearby but soon realised I would have to get a taxi to a locality where there were any.  It would have been nice if the hotel had a convenience store included, so I could have bought some noodles for dinner.  I couldn't even enjoy the inclusive breakfast as I had to get away early to get a train to Shenzhen and the restaurant wasn't open.  The only thing close was a huge sports hall and another high-end restaurant, nothing else of interest for klms.  No fault of the hotel itself, which I couldn't really fault.  In fact my room high up had magnificent views across the river to the mountains.  The room itself was immaculate and the internet was lightning fast.  Also great range of TV stations.  If I was catching an early train from South Station and staying here again, I'd bring some high class noodles with me.

reviews.title: They haven't returned the $200 deposit for 1.5 months already
reviews.positives: Comfortable room
reviews.negatives: They took a $200 deposit which they didn't return later (don't agree to pay the deposit). Very few options for lunch or dinner. The restaurant wasn't open every evening.

Warm regards.

Your kind words about our associates will be shared with the team, as they encourage us to do better at what we are good at. We look forward to providing another memorable experience for your next stay with us.

reviews.title: Everything u can expect for a Sheraton
reviews.text: In comparison of price amount Sheraton, this must be one of the cheapest stay.  But the standard is certainly not anything less than the rest.  One down side is the location.  It is near the expo with nothing in walking distance.  Not even a 7-11. So unless you come with your own transport, check in with everything u need.

reviews.response:
Dear Bernd, thank you for sharing your experience with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and our arrangement. Your suggestion will be shared with the relevant department for further review and improvement. We look forward to welcoming you back to Fuzhou in the future.
Warm regards.

reviews.response:
Dear Ung, thank you for choosing to stay at Sheraton Fuzhou Hotel . We highly appreciate your feedbacks, as it will help us to improve and do better.Our hotel is conveniently located beside the exhibition center,on the banks of the Minjiang River. It also offers easy access to the city’s transportation network. We look forward to welcoming you back again in the future.
Warm regards.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Excellent Hotel
This is one of the very new hotel in Fuzhou having a lot of spaces and impressive artwork all over the places inside the hotel, Hotel is very near to the river and one of the big exhibition hall. However, I need to visit interesting places by Taxi most of the time as it is too far away from the city but I really enjoy staying here. From my room, I was able to have a magnificent views across the river to the mountains. I must say that the staff are very helpful and I was extremely pleased of the surrounding, comfortable bed and clean room. Will certainly be here again when i visit Fuzhou in the near future.
reviews.response:
Dear LIM, thank you for staying with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our hotel facilities and hospitality. As a Marriott hotel, we strive to personalize every experience for all our guests, and we are glad to hear that our services met your expectations. We look forward to welcoming you back again in the future.
Warm regards.

reviews.title: Staff working attitude
reviews.text: good but concierge service was too bad.  Our supplier delivered samples and I tried to collect the sample but Hotel told me that they didn't get the samples and I was told from our supplier that they collected samples undelivered to me and I had to spend USD60 to get samples by fedex later.

reviews.text: This is luxury hotel is great is you want to get away from the busy city. When there is no conference going on, this hotel is serene and romantic. The location is out of the way from city attractions, but a great spot if you want some peace and quiet.

Warm regards.

reviews.title: 一般般
reviews.text: 冲着泳池去的
reviews.response: 尊敬的宾客，十分感谢您下榻福州中庚喜来登酒店！感谢您与我们分享您的住宿体验，您宝贵的评价是促使酒店不断进步！酒店拥有东南亚海岛景观的户外花园，徜徉于此，呼吸大自然的清新空气，抑或畅游于户外花园泳池（夏季开放），舒展身肢、放飞心情，体验从内而外的容光焕发。同时酒店周边许多本地的热门景点也都可步行前往，包括：福州花海公园、福州城市规划馆、林浦古村。期待您的再次入住！

reviews.title: 豪华舒适
reviews.text: 入住福州喜来登酒店，总体感觉豪华舒适，非常适合家庭旅行，商务洽谈等的首选，但由于是新酒店，墙纸还有未干的印记，不过不影响居住，酒店注重了很多细节的处理，感觉很人性化。浴室宽敞豪华。总之称得上是五星标准，除了地点偏僻，交通不便之外，其他都还好。
reviews.positives: 服务，环境，卫生，舒适度等等

reviews.title: 整體感覺很好，唯有在櫃檯辦理入住的一位男性員工的工作能力及態度極需改進
reviews.text: 此次住宿此喜來登酒店原先是充滿期待，但由於櫃檯辦理入住的員工的辦事能力及態度極為不佳，造成重複訂房，所幸是agoda 的客服人員十分用心協助處理，得以順利處理圓滿，令我對agoda 還是充滿信任，有信心再繼續支持。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 員工服務好，當時發生充電插頭沒帶就借用到歸還，房間沒異味房間又寬闊，下次有機會會再入住
